channel.title: healthy-light-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh healthy-light-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Strawberry Rhubarb Jam: Balancing Sweetness and Tartness in a Spring Classic
item.description: A detailed guide to making strawberry rhubarb jam that achieves the ideal harmony between sweetness and tartness. Learn how the natural pectin in rhubarb helps the jam set, the importance of timing fruit additions, and how to balance sugar for preservation and flavor.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 40 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 500g (1 lb 2 oz) fresh strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 400g (14 oz) fresh rhubarb, trimmed and cut into 1/2-inch (1.25 cm) pieces
  • 600g (2 2/3 cups) granulated sugar
  • 1 tbsp (15 ml) fresh lemon juice
  • 1/2 tsp (2.5 ml) vanilla extract (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #granulated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Strawberry Rhubarb Jam: Balancing Sweetness and Tartness in a Spring Classic
media:content.media:description: A detailed guide to making strawberry rhubarb jam that achieves the ideal harmony between sweetness and tartness. Learn how the natural pectin in rhubarb helps the jam set, the importance of timing fruit additions, and how to balance sugar for preservation and flavor.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, granulated

item.title: Vibrant Vegan Buddha Bowl with Spring Vegetables and Creamy Tahini Dressing
item.description: A detailed recipe for a vegan Buddha bowl that highlights fresh spring vegetables paired with a creamy tahini dressing. This recipe balances freshness and creaminess while incorporating herbs that add brightness and complexity. Ideal for light meals that are both satisfying and nourishing.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 100g (3.5 oz) cooked quinoa or brown rice
  • 1 cup (150g) shredded red cabbage
  • 1 cup (130g) thinly sliced cucumber
  • 1 cup (130g) grated carrot
  • 1/2 cup (75g) cooked chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1/2 cup (75g) steamed asparagus tips or green beans
  • 1/4 cup (15g) fresh parsley leaves, roughly chopped
  • 1/4 cup (15g) fresh mint leaves, roughly chopped
  • 2 tbsp (30ml) tahini
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) fresh lemon juice
  • 1 tsp (5ml) maple syrup or agave nectar
  • 1 small garlic clove, minced
  • 2-3 tbsp (30-45ml) water, to thin dressing
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #shredded #thinly

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Vibrant Vegan Buddha Bowl with Spring Vegetables and Creamy Tahini Dressing
media:content.media:description: A detailed recipe for a vegan Buddha bowl that highlights fresh spring vegetables paired with a creamy tahini dressing. This recipe balances freshness and creaminess while incorporating herbs that add brightness and complexity. Ideal for light meals that are both satisfying and nourishing.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cooked, shredded, thinly
